summary.lv: ARRISE meklē Senior Product Owner Roulette spēļu produktu vadīšanai, funkcionalitāšu prioritizēšanai un sadarbībai ar izstrādes komandām Agile vidē.
summary.en: ARRISE seeks a Senior Product Owner to define Roulette game product vision, prioritize features, and coordinate development teams in an Agile environment.
